<!-- Thank you for contributing to Liturgy. See CONTRIBUTING.md. -->

## Summary

<!-- What problem does this solve, and what is the resulting behavior? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Testing

<!-- How was this verified? Include commands run and results. -->

- [ ] `dotnet test` (unit and/or integration) as relevant
- [ ] `npm test` and/or `npm run e2e` as relevant
- [ ] `dotnet build` / `npm run build` succeed

## Checklist

- [ ] Enforcement rules (if touched) are covered by backend tests and are server-authoritative
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or real data in the diff
- [ ] Database changes include a forward migration
- [ ] Documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` updated where behavior changed
- [ ] The change is focused, with unrelated formatting kept out of the diff
